results.title: Zoho | BBB Complaints | Better Business Bureau
results.content:
REMOVED Recruit. My experience with Zoho has generally been positive, but this recent situation has been extremely frustrating.Zoho Recruit placed my account under manual verification, which is a normal process for new accounts. I submitted all required documents immediately. Instead of reviewing them properly, the support team repeatedly misunderstood the process and instructed me to contact job boards for verification. Something that is not part of Zoho Recruits manual verification at REMOVED account was working perfectly until Zoho requested the manual verification. I can clearly prove that there were no issues on my account before that request, and nothing involving job boards required intervention. Despite this, support continued giving the same incorrect instructions, creating [...] For security and privacy reasons, we must complete the required account ownership validations before restoring access to any account. Unfortunately, the information provided during the recovery attempts did not meet the validation requirements necessary for us to confirm ownership.

To help you regain access, our team suggested attempting to restore access to the configured recovery email address or phone number through the respective email or mobile service provider. Once access to either of these recovery options is restored, the account can be recovered easily through the standard recovery process.

We understand this situation can be frustrating, but these safeguards are in place to protect users from unauthorized access. [...] Date:01/30/2026

Type:Service or Repair Issues Status:Answered More info## Complaint statuses

results.title: Our Review Of Zoho CRM after 60 Days
results.content:
Image 5: Sunderjan Siddharth Image 6: Sunderjan Siddharth Sunderjan Siddharth Zoho Follow       
   Sunderjan Siddharth Image 7: Sunderjan Siddharth Sunderjan Siddharth Zoho Follow      
   4 months ago

Hello Mark,

I completely understand your frustration, spending more on fixes and consultants and issues like broken parent child syncing, manual bulk scripts for 40k records, and inaccurate timestamps absolutely erode trust in the system. You're right, this shouldn't require constant workarounds.

I’m sorry that your experience led you to reconsider the platform. Your feedback is important. If you ever decide to revisit or would like a fresh review of the setup, I’d be more than willing to help. [...] We give up. I spend more on Zoho plus consultants trying to fix Zoho than I spent on Salesforce. Returning to Salesforce. Zoho has broken parent-child relationships in general. If all the work is done to get one field from accounts to show in contacts, the field is not updated until I run a script to update 40,000 contacts 100 at a time. One more change. 40,000 more updates. This is not how a relational database is supposed to work. All the dates are just wrong. Scripts insert a user, a paid user, as having changed all data at night. We spend a fortune making fields that say last change etc. with rules that are not broken. They force useless fields into most tables. They are amazing beautiful people with a seriously flawed product. [...] @Mark Woodruff

MW

Mark Woodruff

Follow

. We understand your frustration, and coming from a software background yourself, you know the challenges of technical debt that can arise.However, that's not an excuse. We value your feedback.

Here's what we're going to do:

   Review your past forum posts: We'll revisit the respective threads related to the problems you mentioned to understand the specific functionalities you requested.
   Internal discussion: Our team will discuss these functionalities and assess if any changes in priorities can be made to address them.

results.title: Zoho Desk Customer Reviews 2026 | Knowledge Management
results.content:
What do you dislike most about this product?

I have two minor gripes with Desk. The first is we discovered a few months ago that it had only been creating tickets for about half of the emails our customers sent us. After some digging i discovered it was because Desk's spam filter was blocking a ton of our customers. I turned it off and the problem has ended, but it's still frustrating now becuase I have to sort through dozens of spam messages every week. My only other gripe is that you can't mark tickets as spam in the app, related to the first issue.

What recommendations would you give to someone considering this product? [...] What differentiates Zoho Desk from other similar products?

This product provide extensive mechanisms that are perfect for customer conversations where direct engagement is well shown.

What is your favorite aspect of this product?

The dashboard is easy to understand and use.The availability on multi platform support .Has an excellent and easy to use ticketing system .

What do you dislike most about this product?

The mobile apps lacks some functions compared to desktop version.

What recommendations would you give to someone considering this product?

Zoho Desk is an excellent Customer support product that I would highly recommend to any size of organization.

### Pros

results.title: Zoho is rated "Great" with 3.9 / 5 on Trustpilot
results.content:
1 days ago

Image 30: Rated 1 out of 5 stars

## Great CRM, but integration issues make daily use frustrating.
Great on their system webpages, but plagued with low-effort coding when integrated with other email/contacts services. Don't even bother with zoho sites unless you are ready to css and javascript code for yourself. (One.com is better for low- skill-level webpages. Get ready for plenty of clicks for editing text and objects on Sites.)

Zoho Bigin and Zoho CRM works fine until you actually want to get your contacts on Outlook on windows 11 as a local install, you can only see contacts created on their systems when logged into the outlook web portal. [...] no longer in use and the platform's inability to support bulk business emails, leading to business disruptions for some. A few other people also felt that some aspects of the website were clunky or that certain features did not work properly, making tasks more difficult than they should be.See more [...] Evaluating 634 reviews, reviewers had a great experience with this company. Many customers find the user experience to be very friendly and easy to use, especially for managing social media platforms. Reviewers appreciate the ability to centralize social media management, scheduling posts, and analyzing performance, which significantly simplifies their workflow. The platform is often described as reliable, efficient, and offering a clean, professional interface that helps keep things organized. However, some people were dissatisfied with customer service, citing issues like unresponsiveness, lack of follow-up, and difficulties in reaching support, particularly in the UK. There are also concerns about unexpected billing for services no longer in use and the platform's inability to support
